name: ExtensionValueSet_Compose_Include_Filter_Op
title: R5: = | is-a | descendent-of | is-not-a | regex | in | not-in | generalizes | child-of | descendent-leaf | exists
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ValueSet.compose.include.filter.op` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ValueSet.compose.include.filter.op` 1..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ValueSet.compose.include.filter.op` 1..1 `code`
*  R4B: `ValueSet.compose.include.filter.op` 1..1 `code`
*  R4: `ValueSet.compose.include.filter.op` 1..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ValueSet.compose.include.filter.op` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ValueSet.compose.include.filter.op` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.

element.short: R5: = | is-a | descendent-of | is-not-a | regex | in | not-in | generalizes | child-of | descendent-leaf | exists
element.comment:
Element `ValueSet.compose.include.filter.op` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ValueSet.compose.include.filter.op` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
In case filter.property represents a property of the system, the operation applies to the selected property. In case filter.property represents a filter of the system, the operation SHALL match one of the CodeSystem.filter.operator values.

element.short: = | is-a | descendent-of | is-not-a | regex | in | not-in | generalizes | child-of | descendent-leaf | exists
element.definition: The kind of operation to perform as a part of the filter criteria.
element.comment: In case filter.property represents a property of the system, the operation applies to the selected property. In case filter.property represents a filter of the system, the operation SHALL match one of the CodeSystem.filter.operator values.

binding.description: The kind of operation to perform as a part of a property based filter.
